summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v5.0 enrollment & passenger management features. All 52 backend tests pass (25 enrollment tests + 27 core tests). Frontend status dashboard verified working correctly.
passed_tests: New user flow: first message → enrollment_method state
Enrollment method option 1 → enrolling_scan state
Enrollment method option 3 → enrolling_manual_fn state (manual entry)
Manual enrollment: first name → last name → passport → confirming_profile
Passport skip with 'passer' accepted
Passport skip with 'skip' accepted
Profile confirmation option 1 saves profile to DB, sets passenger_id
Profile confirmation option 2 restarts enrollment
Returning user skips enrollment → asking_travel_purpose state
Self booking option 1 sets booking_passenger_id to self
Complete self booking flow: enrollment → destination → date → flight → payment → ticket
Third-party booking: option 2 → selecting_third_party state
Third-party new person enrollment: enrolling_third_party_method → tp_manual_fn/ln/pp → confirming_tp_profile → save_tp_prompt
Saved third-party appears in _tp_list on subsequent bookings
Saved third-party selection sets booking_passenger_id
Multi-passenger stub: entering > 1 continues with 1 passenger
Input validation: name with numbers rejected
Input validation: name too short (< 2 chars) rejected
Input validation: name with hyphen accepted
Input validation: passport < 6 chars rejected
Global cancel: 'annuler' works in enrollment_method state
Global cancel: 'annuler' works in enrolling_manual_fn state
Global cancel: 'annuler' works in confirming_profile state
Global cancel: 'annuler' works in third-party enrollment states
Booking has booking_passenger_id field set
Health endpoint returns all 4 payment operators
Health endpoint returns all integrations
Health endpoint returns status=healthy, type=whatsapp_agent, version=5.0.0
Travel request after enrollment → awaiting_date state
Flight selection → awaiting_payment_method with booking_ref
MTN MoMo payment (option 1) initiates correctly
Moov Money payment (option 2) initiates correctly
Google Pay payment (option 3) initiates correctly
Apple Pay payment (option 4) initiates correctly
Flight categorization returns PLUS_BAS, PLUS_RAPIDE, PREMIUM
PLUS_BAS is cheapest flight option
PLUS_RAPIDE is fastest flight option
Booking ref format TRV-XXXXXX (6 alphanumeric chars)
Ticket download endpoint returns 404 for missing files
Complete flow generates downloadable PDF ticket
Payment page returns HTML with sim=1 parameter
Payment page returns 404 without payment intent
'annuler' cancels booking and resets state to idle
Payment retry flow triggered after failure
Option 3 cancels from retry state
Whisper transcribe endpoint exists
OGG file transcription endpoint works
Webhook verification succeeds with correct token
Webhook verification fails with wrong token
frontend_tests_passed: Payment operators section with 4 operator cards (MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
All operator cards show correct status badges (Missing - expected with placeholder creds)
How It Works section with 6 steps
Webhook Configuration section with endpoint and verify token
Good dark theme with proper contrast

mocked_apis.note: All payment APIs are SIMULATED when credentials are placeholder values
mocked_list: Stripe Google/Apple Pay - simulated (no real key)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent
Amadeus API - mock flights generated when no real key

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/message?phone={phone}&message={text}
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers (22990XXXXXX format) for clean sessions. Passenger profiles created during tests are stored in MongoDB passengers collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enrollment and passenger management features working correctly. Key state machine flow: new user → enrollment_method → (scan or manual) → confirming_profile → asking_travel_purpose → (self or third-party) → asking_passenger_count → awaiting_destination → awaiting_date → awaiting_flight_selection → awaiting_payment_method → payment → ticket. Third-party profiles saved with created_by_phone field. Max 5 TP profiles per phone. Session timeout is 30 minutes. Use unique phone numbers for each test to avoid session conflicts.
